title: Windows Kerberos Pre-Authentication Failure Spike
description: Detects repeated Kerberos pre-authentication failures through Event ID 4771, prioritizing bad-password, invalid-user, expired-ticket, and clock-skew result codes.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4771' and (Status in ('0x6', '0x12', '0x17', '0x18', '0x20', '0x25') or 'Failure Reason' in ('0x6', '0x12', '0x17', '0x18', '0x20', '0x25') or msg like '*Failure Code*') | stats count as Failures, distinctcount('Source Address') as UniqueSources by 'Target User Name', 'Source Address', 'Host Name (Server)' | where Failures > 3 | sort -Failures
falsepositives: Password changes, expired credentials, or workstation clock skew
